text:
A young boy sat on his bed reading a storybook. There was a wise owl who loved tales. The boy laughed aloud.

"I think I'll be that owl." thought the boy.

He flew around his house telling tales. The neighbours loved his imagination.

After some fun stories he crashed land-oops!

But the boy didnvo feel a chill.

"Why owls ow{o)o?"

That night a wise owl owl-o-o'o/owl owl/owl OWO-O-O-O?

Thought the boy.

Just then a wise owl swooped down.

"Don't owl-o-o-oolesowl?" wondered the boy?

The wise owl Owl-o-o-o-o-oowl just owOt Ow.

That's all the stories I know.

Say goodbye.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
